# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React frontend application built with TypeScript, using Vite as the build tool. It follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns:

- **Frontend Framework**: React 18 with functional components and hooks
- **Type Safety**: Full TypeScript implementation
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with shadcn/ui design system
- **Routing**: React Router for client-side navigation
- **Backend**: Supabase for database, authentication, and serverless functions
- **State Management**: React context and hooks (no external state library)

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Component Organization
- **UI Components** (`src/components/ui/`): Reusable base components from shadcn/ui
- **Feature Components**: Organized by domain (attendance, employee-profile, payroll, etc.)
- **Layout Components**: AppLayout, TopBar, Sidebar for consistent navigation
- **Page Components**: Top-level route components in `src/pages/`

### Data Flow
- Direct Supabase client integration using `@supabase/supabase-js`
- Real-time subscriptions for live data updates
- Edge functions for complex business logic (attendance parsing, payroll generation)
- Authentication handled via Supabase Auth with custom user management

### Business Logic
- **Attendance Management**: AI-powered parsing of Excel files, automatic calculation of working hours, overtime, and late status
- **Employee Lifecycle**: Onboarding with mandatory password changes, profile management, salary reviews
- **Leave System**: Balance tracking, request workflows, approval processes
- **Payroll Processing**: Automated payroll generation with overtime calculations
- **Project Management**: Team assignments, activity logging, task tracking

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point, renders the root App component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main app component with routing setup
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Home/dashboard page

### Authentication & User Management
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication context and user state management
- `src/components/MandatoryPasswordChange.tsx`: Password reset flow for new users

### Layout & Navigation
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main layout wrapper
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation bar
- `src/components/NavLink.tsx`: Enhanced NavLink with active state styling

### Employee Management
- `src/components/employee-profile/`: Tab-based profile views (Attendance, Documents, Leave, Payroll, Salary)
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx`: Employee selection with search functionality

### Attendance System
- `src/components/attendance/AttendanceUploadFlow.tsx`: Complex upload flow with AI parsing
- `src/lib/attendance-format.ts`: Time formatting utilities

### UI Component Library
- `src/components/ui/`: Complete shadcn/ui component library
- Custom components like `BeudoxLogo.tsx` for branding

### Utility Libraries
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Permission and role management
- `src/lib/notifications.ts`: Notification system utilities
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts`: Leave balance calculations
- `src/lib/review-schedule.ts`: Salary review scheduling logic

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/`: Supabase client setup and type definitions
- Supabase edge functions for server-side processing

## Database Schema Insights

Based on the code analysis, the system manages:

- **Employees**: Profiles, roles, departments, salary information
- **Attendance Records**: Daily check-in/out, working hours, overtime
- **Leave Management**: Leave types, balances, requests, approvals
- **Payroll**: Salary components, overtime pay, deductions
- **Projects**: Team assignments, tasks, activity logs
- **Company Settings**: Policies, holidays, shift configurations
- **HR Policies**: Document management
- **Notifications**: Customizable alert system

## Configuration and Environment

- **Build Config**: `vite.config.ts`, `tsconfig.json`, `tailwind.config.ts`
- **Environment**: `.env` with Supabase credentials
- **Testing**: `vitest.config.ts`, `playwright.config.ts`
- **Linting**: `eslint.config.js`

## Development Workflow

- **Local Development**: `npm run dev` starts Vite dev server
- **Building**: `npm run build` creates production bundle
- **Testing**: Unit tests with Vitest, E2E with Playwright
- **Code Quality**: ESLint for code linting

## Key Business Rules

- **Password Security**: Mandatory password changes for new users with strength validation
- **Attendance Processing**: Automatic calculation of working hours, late status, overtime
- **Leave Balances**: Real-time balance tracking with business day calculations
- **Role-Based Access**: Permission system controlling feature access
- **Salary Reviews**: Scheduled reviews with increment proposals

## Performance Considerations

- **Component Optimization**: React.memo and useMemo for expensive operations
- **Data Fetching**: Efficient Supabase queries with proper indexing assumed
- **Bundle Size**: Tree-shaking enabled, component library optimized
- **Real-time Updates**: Supabase subscriptions for live data

This codebase represents a production-ready HR management system with modern React patterns, comprehensive TypeScript typing, and robust business logic implementation.
